final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing tactical equipment display illustration with a hardcore military aesthetic (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a hardcore military / tactical gear showcase aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include firearms, ballistic vests, and night-vision devices arranged in an orderly, systematic layout
Subject: must include:
  - various firearms (rifles, handguns, etc.)
  - ballistic / plate-carrier vests
  - night-vision devices / goggles
Scene/backdrop: must include a dark, deep-toned background
Lighting/mood: needs a cold, stern, authoritative atmosphere — exact light source mix and shadow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a dark, desaturated direction with cold tones — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs hard metallic and tactical fabric surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
